[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000010 1
1 000010110 3
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 100000001 2
5 000001100 2
6 000100000 1
7 000000100 1

01 10 111101101 7
12 21 011101111 7
23 32 000110110 4
34 43 110111110 7
45 54 110111101 7
56 65 111110011 7
67 76 101011111 7
70 07 100111111 7

02 20 100101111 6
13 31 011111111 8
24 42 110101110 6
35 53 010110111 6
46 64 111011111 8
57 75 110111111 8
60 06 101111011 7
71 17 111011111 8

03 30 100111111 7
14 41 111001101 6
25 52 010110111 6
36 63 101110111 7
47 74 110011110 6
50 05 110111001 6
61 16 111011111 8
72 27 100111110 6

04 40 110101101 6
15 51 011111101 7
26 62 101110111 7
37 73 100111110 6
